creator: jhb@FreeBSD.org
text: Happy to commit it once Luca has reviewed it.  There is no test suite for the kgdb bits of gdb, though I did test these changes by debugging a crashdump from a NULL function pointer panic (and had to fix kgdb to debug it).  The other two patches I had tested previously as well (running kgdb against a kernel without debug symbols and checking 'info sharedlibrary' and using 'kgdb -n last').
